lines: Long ago, every creature and every valley sang as one.
The world was bound by an ancient force — The Chorus.
The bond shattered. Regions fell silent.
The creatures that remained are called Harmons.
Each one carries a fragment of the old song.
Now strange signals ripple across the Routes.
Whispers speak of The Veil — hooded watchers.
They warn that restoring the song could awaken something terrible.
You arrive at Harmona Rest, at the edge of the unknown.
Route Rangers guard what remains. Your journey begins.
Harmona Rest — where explorers gather before the Routes.
Nurse Odalie tends travelers. Rumors of The Fracture linger.
Your Harmon stirs at your touch.
A faint melody echoes — the first note of a bond.
Head north through the gate to Route 1.
Find Harmons, challenge Rangers, and uncover The Fracture.
